steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Despite the damage ______ Soviet censors shows that the censors caused the damage.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Wrought by means “caused by”, so the phrase reads “damage wrought by Soviet censors” – damage caused by the censors. The other three either suggest damage given to censors, assigned to them, or hidden from them, which reverses the relationship. That matches choice B — B is correct.
